name: Cotton & Company LLP
description: Cotton is a CPA firm that specializes in providing services for governmental agencies and commercial clients, focusing on accountability and the proper handling of taxpayer money and data. Their work involves validating documentation to ensure funds are used appropriately, contributing to efficient government operations.

name: U.S. Cotton
description: Cotton's mission is to manufacture and market high-quality cotton products, including cotton rounds, swabs, and balls, that meet and exceed customer needs. The company emphasizes quality, value, and innovation, positioning itself as a leading provider of health and beauty cotton products in the Americas.

name: Cotton
description: Cotton Incorporated plays a vital role in supporting cotton growers and related industries through research and technical services. They highlight the versatility of cotton, noting its use in products like nonwoven wipes, feminine hygiene items, and diapers, emphasizing its value as a natural and sustainable fiber.

name: Cotton Field (BD) Ltd.
description: Cotton Field (BD) Ltd is a prominent manufacturer in the ready-made garments industry, specializing in a diverse range of apparel, including cotton garments. With a monthly output of approximately 2 million pieces, the company serves various markets, ensuring a strong presence in the cotton clothing sector.

name: John Cotton Group
description: John Cotton Group is dedicated to developing sustainable bedding, highlighting their long history of innovation in fabrics and fibers. As the UK's largest manufacturer of pillows and duvets, they emphasize quality and sustainability in their production practices.

name: Cotton House
description: Cotton House specializes in outsourcing home textiles and apparel production, leveraging its extensive knowledge of raw materials and manufacturing to ensure competitive pricing and quality assurance. Their experienced team focuses on sustainability and efficient supply chain management, making them a reliable partner in the textile industry.

name: Zuum México
description: U.S. Cotton, founded in 1983, is a leading manufacturer of cotton products across the Americas and the top producer of organic cotton in the United States.

name: COTTON USA™
description: The Cotton Trust Protocol® is a key initiative that ensures sustainability in the cotton supply chain, aligning with the growing consumer demand for responsibly sourced products, particularly those marked with the COTTON USA™ label. This focus on sustainability and superior U.S. cotton can significantly enhance business profitability and productivity.

name: Cotton Traders
description: Cotton Traders offers a range of clothing and footwear, emphasizing quality and sustainability.

name: Biocotton
description: BioCotton is a leading distributor of medical cotton products, emphasizing their commitment to high quality and reliability.
